roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:RELEASE TO ANOTHER AGENCY/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING REQUIRMENT IS TERMINATED/CTORD:PASSPORT SURRENDERED TO COURT 0N 09-10-19 IN D12 TO BE RETURNED TO THE DEFENDANT/SATERM/BE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW60/LDPX:10-28-19(60TH)/987,2/SAORD/SA1:LILIAN FENG, KATHETINE FENG, EDWARD(MAX) FENG II, ROSIE FENG/SAORD3/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/LD:10-28-19 (60TH)/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM IN D20/DOP/TE:2 DAYS/
